name: forecasting_run_sales_forecast_job
description:
Trigger the sales-forecast Glue ETL job that re-computes forecasts and writes the results to the Iceberg table.

The job is idempotent: it deletes existing rows for the target calc_period + scenario_uuid + company_id before appending fresh results.

The tool returns immediately with a JobRunId. Use forecasting_check_sales_forecast_job_status to monitor progress.

Jobs typically take 3-5 minutes to complete.

IMPORTANT:
- Before calling, use get_forecasting_settings for the company to obtain the correct scenario_uuid(s).
- company_id, calc_period, and scenario_uuids are all REQUIRED to prevent unintentional broad recalculations.
- After starting, use forecasting_check_sales_forecast_job_status — do NOT check earlier than 3 minutes.

company_id.description: Required. The company to run the forecast for. Use get_forecasting_settings to look up the company's forecasting configuration.

calc_period.description: Required. Calculation period in YYYY-MM format (e.g. '2026-03').

scenario_uuids.description: Required. Scenario UUID(s) to run. Use get_forecasting_settings for the company to get the default scenario_uuid.

inventory_id.description: Optional. Run forecast for a single inventory item only. Omit to run for ALL items in the company.

job_run_id.description: The Glue JobRunId for tracking via forecasting_check_sales_forecast_job_status.

state.description: STARTED on success, DENIED if not authorized.

arguments_sent.description: The full argument map sent to the Glue job.

next_step.description: Guidance on what to do next.
